tasks.subject: Task 0: onboarding/ — Wizard HTML + CSS
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Full 14-step wizard with progress bar, navigation, and confirmation screen.

**Files:**
- Create: `onboarding/index.html`
- Create: `onboarding/style.css`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] 14 steps navigate correctly
- [ ] Progress bar updates (N/14)
- [ ] Demo button on step 1
- [ ] Confirmation screen hidden until submit

**Verify:** Open onboarding/index.html → click through all 14 steps

```json:metadata
{"files": ["onboarding/index.html", "onboarding/style.css"], "verifyCommand": "open onboarding/index.html", "acceptanceCriteria": ["14 steps navigate correctly", "Progress bar updates", "Demo button visible on step 1"], "requiresUserVerification": false}
```

tasks.subject: Task 1: onboarding/ — Génération config.js + navigation + démo
tasks.description:
**Goal:** JS wizard navigation, demo data pre-fill, and config.js generation.

**Files:**
- Create: `onboarding/script.js`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Navigation wizard fonctionne
- [ ] Démo pré-remplit tous les champs
- [ ] generateConfigJS retourne JS valide
- [ ] Objet MARIAGE conforme au schéma

**Verify:** Charger démo → console → generateConfigJS(generateMAIRIAGE())

```json:metadata
{"files": ["onboarding/script.js"], "verifyCommand": "open onboarding/index.html — charger démo, console generateConfigJS(generateMAIRIAGE())", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Navigation wizard fonctionne", "Démo pré-remplit tous les champs", "generateConfigJS retourne JS valide"], "requiresUserVerification": false}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: onboarding/ — Envoi EmailJS + téléchargement + confirmation
tasks.description:
**Goal:** On submit, download config.js, send email via EmailJS, show confirmation.

**Files:**
- Modify: `onboarding/script.js`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Fichier config téléchargé automatiquement
- [ ] Email reçu avec contenu config
- [ ] Confirmation visible après envoi
- [ ] Bouton désactivé pendant envoi

**Verify:** Remplir démo → Envoyer → vérifier téléchargement + email + confirmation

```json:metadata
{"files": ["onboarding/script.js"], "verifyCommand": "Remplir démo → Envoyer → vérifier téléchargement + email + confirmation", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Fichier config téléchargé", "Email reçu", "Confirmation visible", "Bouton désactivé pendant envoi"], "requiresUserVerification": false}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: studio/ — Layout HTML + CSS
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Studio split layout with topbar, left form panel, right iframe panel.

**Files:**
- Create: `studio/index.html`
- Create: `studio/style.css`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Layout split 360px/reste
- [ ] Drop zone centrée côté droit
- [ ] Topbar avec boutons Load et Export

**Verify:** Ouvrir via Live Server → vérifier layout

```json:metadata
{"files": ["studio/index.html", "studio/style.css"], "verifyCommand": "Ouvrir via Live Server → vérifier layout split", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Layout split 360px/reste", "Drop zone visible", "Topbar correcte"], "requiresUserVerification": false}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: studio/ — Engine complet (preview + drag & drop + export)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Full studio engine: fetch template, Blob URL preview, drag & drop, live refresh, export.

**Files:**
- Create: `studio/script.js`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Drag & drop config.js charge le site dans l'iframe
- [ ] Formulaire pré-rempli après drop
- [ ] Refresh live après 500ms debounce
- [ ] Export télécharge config-prenom1-prenom2.js

**Verify:** Via Live Server: drag template/config.js → iframe charge le site mariage

```json:metadata
{"files": ["studio/script.js"], "verifyCommand": "Via Live Server: drag template/config.js → iframe charge", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Drag & drop charge le site", "Formulaire pré-rempli", "Refresh live 500ms", "Export nommé"], "requiresUserVerification": false}
```
